case_title: STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC., vs. AARON, CURTIS L.

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. SERVED OCT-09-1992, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AARON, CURTIS L.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $104.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AARON, CURTIS L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATES RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AARON, CURTIS L. $826.18 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $121.67 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,321.85
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,434.76 AS TO DEFENDANT AARON, CURTIS L.
